nasb.text: Behold, your people are women in your midst! The gates of your land are opened wide to your enemies; Fire consumes your gate bars.

esv.text: Behold, your troops are women in your midst. The gates of your land are wide open to your enemies; fire has devoured your bars.

cnv.text: 看哪！在你裡面的人都是婦女， 你境內的門戶， 都向仇敵敞開； 你的門閂被火燒毀。

ccb.text: 看啊， 你的军队就像柔弱的女人， 你境内的关口向敌人敞开， 你的门闩被火烧毁。
